TimeEntry.Title: Manage engine Update on WKNOR-FDLEFT, WKNOR-FDRIGHT, WKOR-KEYCARD to Version 11.4.2528.25.W
TimeEntry.Notes: Review the My RMM portal, and found the machine WKNOR-FDLEFT, WKNOR-FDRIGHT, WKOR-KEYCARD running with old version of Manage-Engine. So connected to the machine and then uninstalled the OLD version and downloaded and installed the latest version (11.4.2528.25.W) of the manage-engine agent. Verified from the portal, device is running with updated agent version.

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage-Engine Latest version 11.4.2528.28.W updated:- WKNOR-CASSELLS and WKNOR-HOUSEKEEP
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.4.2528.28.W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine (WKNOR-CASSELLS and  WKNOR-HOUSEKEEP) from Manage Engine, Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: NOR Veeam backups didn't run from last 2 days
TimeEntry.Notes: Monitor the Veeam backups for NOR and found backups didn't run from last 2 days. So checked the backup schedule, it didn't run on scheduled time. So run the manual backups, now the backups are pased.

TimeEntry.Title: NOR-HQ-VBR-01,WKNOR-CASSELLS,WKNOR-FDRIGHT,WKNOR-HOUSEKEEPING,WKNOR-FDLEFT,WKNOR-FDLEFT,WKOR-KEYCARD,,WKNOR-BACKOFFIC,WKNOR-FOM: Myrmm found not sync with server
TimeEntry.Notes: NOR-HQ-VBR-01,WKNOR-CASSELLS,WKNOR-FDRIGHT,WKNOR-HOUSEKEEPING,WKNOR-FDLEFT,WKNOR-FDLEFT,WKOR-KEYCARD,,WKNOR-BACKOFFIC,WKNOR-FOM: Myrmm found not sync with server not updated with latest version, so download the latest version from myrmm and by accessing the machine, first remove and then installed with latest package. Now they all were updated with latest version.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Failed Veeam backups for NOR
TimeEntry.Notes: Monitor the veeam backups for NOR. NOR backups were failed. So login into the server and troubleshoot the issue for failed backups. Backup repository space was Low disk space, only 20KB space was left. So open the backup repository path, clean the trashbox for the backups moved after retention policy. After that rescan the backup repository , now the space has increased to 584 GB. After this retired the backup job. Now backups are running.

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage-Engine Latest version 11.4.2528.28.W updated:- NOR-HQ-VBR-01, WKNOR-BACKOFFIC
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.4.2528.28.W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine (NOR-HQ-VBR-01, WKNOR-BACKOFFIC)Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage Engine agent upgraded to the latest version 11.4.2528.28 on WKNOR-FDRIGHT, WKNOR-FOM, WKOR-KEYCARD
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.4.2528.28 W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine (WKNOR-FDRIGHT, WKNOR-FOM, WKOR-KEYCARD) Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: NOR Veeam backups didn't run on scheduled time
TimeEntry.Notes: Monitor the Veeam backups for NOR and found backups didn't run from last 1 day. So checked the backup schedule, it didn't run on scheduled time. So run the manual backups, backups got failed again. Checked the error details Veeam backups are failed as rental license is expired including 60 days of grace period. So will discuss in meeting for this.

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote version 25.9.5.9483 updated on machine WKNOR-BACKOFFIC,WKNOR-CASSELLS,WKNOR-FDLEFT,WKNOR-FOM
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine WKNOR-BACKOFFIC,WKNOR-CASSELLS,WKNOR-FDLEFT,WKNOR-FOM
running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  .
Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 25.9.5.9483. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest
version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Veeam Backup not working for NOR.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into VBR server for client and then investigate the issue and purchase new license for client from VSPC portal. After that troubleshoot the issue for system access on their network. Because of the old hardware it is barely to access the machine. It is having extremely slowness issue. Need to update client for upgrading the server.

TimeEntry.Title: NOR Veeam backups didn't run on scheduled time
TimeEntry.Notes:
Ticket Summary: NOR-HQ-VBR-01 – Agent and Access Recovery

Worked on NOR-HQ-VBR-01 to resolve multiple access and agent-related issues. Repaired the MyRMM agent and distribution server, followed by troubleshooting and resolving a login issue. Subsequently addressed a Veeam login issue.

During troubleshooting, the server became unresponsive after a reboot. As part of recovery, reinstalled the ScreenConnect agent, ManageEngine agent, and distribution server. After reinstallation, full access to the server was restored and all required services were confirmed operational.

Status: Resolved

TimeEntry.Title: NOR Veeam backups didn't run on scheduled time
TimeEntry.Notes: With the help of Lead, downloaded the new license file and updated the license on NOR-HQ-VBR-01 server and set the license to auto renewal which was set to other VBR servers as well. After the license updation , fixed the backup issue. Now the backups are passed.

TimeEntry.Title: Veeam Backup not working for NOR.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the esxi and then verify both the VMs are up and working fine now. VBR license is also updated and backup job has been completed succussfully.

TimeEntry.Title: WKNOR-CASSELLS : Manually patch update (APD failed update)
TimeEntry.Notes:
Downloaded and applied the patches listed below. Due to a large number of pending patches and slow internet connectivity at the time, not all patches could be installed; however, all listed patches were successfully applied. All these were also updated in myrmm database.

windows10.0-kb5066198
windows10.0-kb5066130
windows-kb890830
Teams updated version
windowsdesktop-runtime-8.0.23-win-x64
AcroRdrDCx64Upd2500121078
LogMeInIgnition
LogMeIn updated
Chrome update
Edge update
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.96 on VMNORRMS,WKNOR-FOM
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines on  is old version V0.14.82. Connected to the machines
VMNORRMS,WKNOR-FOM from manage engine, download and installed the latest version Ver0.14.96. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Reviewed Cisco Umbrella and verified the Umbrella agent version on the NOR systems.
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewed Cisco Umbrella and verified the Umbrella agent version on the NOR systems.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.33.20504.0)updated on machines : WKNOR-FDLEFT and WKNOR-FOM
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines WKNOR-FDLEFT and WKNOR-FOM running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version (7.33.20504.0) of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.33.20505.0)updated on machine :- DESKTOP-4FF8C8K, WKOR-KEYCARD, WKNOR-CASSELLS
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to the machines (DESKTOP-4FF8C8K, WKOR-KEYCARD, WKNOR-CASSELLS) and discovered they were running an older version of CrowdStrike. Attempted to push the sensor from the portal, but the process was unsuccessful.so connect to the system through MYrmm and uninstalled the older version, downloaded, and installed the latest sensor version (7.33.20505.0) on these machines. Verified the update through the portal. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: WKNOR-BACKOFFIC : Myremote sync issue found over this pc
TimeEntry.Notes: This PC was found offline for a long time, even though it appeared online regularly in MyRMM. I accessed and troubleshot the system and found that the session was blocked by Cisco Umbrella. I then checked the DNS policy for the NOR client and updated it to allow myremote2.technijian.com as well as technijian.com. After waiting about 30 seconds, the system was able to connect to MyRemote properly.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: WKNOR-FOM,NOR-HQ-VBR-01,WKNOR-HOUSEKEEPING :Manually patch update as APD failed to do
TimeEntry.Notes: I accessed the machines, reviewed the failed patches, and applied them successfully. I also rescanned the patches, and the applied patch status has now been successfully updated in the MyRMM database.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote
